current_streak.description: Display your current streak in days
current_streak.name: Duolingo Streak

languages_learning_hide_languages.description: List of language names to hide (e.g., Japanese, French)
languages_learning_hide_languages.label: Hide languages
languages_learning_hide_languages.tooltip: List of language names you want to hide from display. Type the exact language name (e.g., 'Japanese', 'French', 'Spanish') and press Enter to add.

languages_learning_max.label: Maximum languages
languages_learning_max.tooltip: Maximum number of languages that will be displayed. Languages are ordered by total XP (highest XP first).

languages_learning.description: Display languages you're learning with XP per language
languages_learning.name: Languages Learning
